creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 0.15.4
- Adapt to the new OPTIONS syntax
- Adapt to the new LIB_DEPENDS syntax
- Stop redefining do-install; the port has its own `make install' that does the same thing provided we use USES=pathfix and tune Makefile.in
- Support staging

Updating to 0.15 is needed for future KDE updates to graphics/libkdcraw-kde4.

Port maintainer (osa@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_11 (mode: update, diff: ports)
